query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "infinite worlds with versatile interactions" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it addresses the core mechanism of "versatile interactions" and "world exploration" in embodied AI by proposing a framework for mental simulation and belief revision, which is the direct methodological extension of the "Infinite Worlds" concept mentioned in the user's query. It provides the necessary canonical prior work on generative world models for planning that a literature review on extending this specific line of research would require.
